articles.title: SEC Considers 21Shares Request to Introduce Staking for Ethereum ETF
articles.description: The SEC has acknowledged a filing from Cboe BZX Exchange on behalf of 21Shares to allow staking for its Ethereum ETF.

articles.title: Cardano vs Ethereum

articles.title: First-Ever Spot XRP ETF Gets Green Light in Brazil
articles.description: Brazil is set to be the first country to launch a spot XRP ETF after the country's regulator gave the green light to Hashdex's product.
